name: Wonderheal XT40 Shades

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Wonderheal XT40 Shades Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Leather 326 Armor +15 Stamina +38 Intellect +22 Spirit Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +9 Healing and +3 Spell Damage Durability 70 / 70 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Increases healing done by up to 106 and damage done by up to 36 for all magical spells and effects. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance. (3 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 4 91 65 This epic leather armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot. It is crafted. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
